title: Dynamic Search with QueryDSL
description: Add dynamic search capabilities to an existing Product API using QueryDSL. Support filtering by multiple optional criteria (name contains, price range, category, date range) with pagination.

features: All criteria are optional (dynamic WHERE clause)

measurement.query_correctness: All filter combinations produce correct results
measurement.performance: Single query (no N+1), DTO projection used
measurement.flexibility: Adding new filter requires only 2-3 lines of code
measurement.testing: Tests cover each filter individually and in combination
